name: NinjaOne (NinjaRMM) MSP API
what_it_does: NinjaOne (formerly NinjaRMM) REST API for endpoint management and MSP platform. Enables AI agents to access device inventory and health data, manage patch status and deployments, trigger remote monitoring alerts, manage organizations and policies, retrieve software inventory, access backup status, handle ticketing and automations, and integrate endpoint data with PSA and documentation systems.
use_cases: Retrieving endpoint health and patch compliance data from IT operations agents
Managing device policies and automation triggers from endpoint management agents
Monitoring backup job status from data protection agents
Integrating device inventory with PSA ticketing from MSP workflow agents
not_for: In-house IT without MSP-style multi-client endpoint management
Network infrastructure management without endpoint focus
Enterprise ITSM without managed service RMM capabilities
best_when: An MSP using NinjaOne wants AI agents to automate endpoint health monitoring, patch compliance reporting, device policy management, and integration with ticketing and documentation tools.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote device access and script execution requires strict authorization. NinjaOne provides broad endpoint control — treat API credentials as highly privileged.

auth.notes: NinjaOne uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Scopes control access to devices, organizations, policies, and reporting. Well-documented OAuth flow. API available to all NinjaOne customers.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial; per-device pricing with volume discounts
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-device monthly pricing; endpoint bundles with backup and security add-ons
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas company, founded 2013. Rebranded as NinjaOne in 2021. One of fastest-growing MSP platforms. Strong API documentation compared to legacy MSP tools. 17,000+ MSP customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; 1200 requests per minute documented

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Broad endpoint control — treat OAuth credentials as highly privileged
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 (scoped)
1200 requests/minute rate limit — generous for bulk device queries
US/EU data residency options — verify for international MSP operations
One of best-documented MSP APIs — good starting point for MSP integrations
Device actions (script execution, restart) are irreversible — implement human-in-loop for risky operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: MSP endpoint management platform with broad device control. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. US/EU data residency. Better security posture than legacy MSP tools.

security_score_components.security_notes: Endpoint management platform. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU data residency. Best security posture among MSP platforms.
